each week, we would double down on what was working and what isn't.

They have a massive brand.

But if you iterate very quickly on the signals you're seeing, that's where we're starting to like reap results and we were able to start tracking conversions to users and paid subscriptions by like week seven or eight.
And I mean, last time I checked, it was like 400 signups on an LTV of 500.
So it's like it's driving like meaningful numbers already or it was like by week eight.
That's no promise, but I'm saying like that's almost a unique example in how willing they were to go for that volume and iterate approach.
Obviously, bigger companies we work with don't.
I always kind of lead with there's not really a quick win, but there's ways to engineer better strategy based on the signals we're seeing.

Yeah, think it's like, first and foremost, the number one comment we get is just like, agent reliability.

So everyone has kind of just been stuck in the doom loop of a lot of these other products, where they're promised the world, and then they like, can't, like actually get there, or like, they can't debug an error, or like, whatever it is.
And so I think like,

Second is, yeah, mobile apps.
